description: Portable knowledge base manifest — lists all books, their sources, and indexing config.

books.name: C++ Reference (cppreference.com)
books.description: Full C++ standard library and language reference — all symbols, headers, and since-versions.

books.name: DirectX 12 Engineering Specs (microsoft/DirectX-Specs)
books.description: Microsoft's engineering-level D3D12 specifications — deeper than the API docs. Covers barriers, descriptor heaps, raytracing, mesh shaders, and resource binding in detail.

books.name: C++ Core Guidelines (Stroustrup & Sutter)
books.description: The canonical guide to modern C++ — RAII, ownership, lifetimes, [[nodiscard]], span, const-correctness, and interface design. Written by Bjarne Stroustrup and Herb Sutter.

books.name: Win32 API Reference (MicrosoftDocs/win32)
books.description: Windows API reference for DirectX, COM, input, windowing, and synchronization — the actual platform layer under D3D12.
